case_title: NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC VS. ANDREW R BLODGETT et al

docket_entries.description: NON SERVICE/RETURN RE: SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-17-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BLODGETT, ANDREW R DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-28-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
